rationale: Trump administration's Cuba sanctions and new DNI pick are the most domestically relevant events; World Cup opening is cultural noise; other headlines are distant.

top_events.title: Trump administration sanctions Cuba's national oil company; Hegseth warns Cuba against acquiring weapons
top_events.summary: New US sanctions on Cuba and a Guantánamo visit signal escalating pressure on Havana — real policy shift with potential regional and domestic political implications.

top_events.title: Trump to pick Jay Clayton as Director of National Intelligence
top_events.summary: Personnel change at a key intelligence post affects US national security apparatus — relevant to domestic governance and policy direction.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Deepening China-DPRK axis complicates US Indo-Pacific strategy and could affect US military posture and alliances in the region.
